title: Rainbow Designs Classic Paddington Bear with Boots and Suitcase 36cm
features: A NOSTALIGIC TREASURE FOR ALL AGES - Our Large Cuddly Classic Paddington plush soft toy with his own suitcase, makes the perfect best friend for playtime adventures for little ones, or as a the ultimate gift for any enthusiast or collector of Paddington Bear.

EVERYONE’S FAVOURITE BEAR – Paddington Bear is one of the most loved characters and adored by all generations from baby through to great grandparent. This fun-loving, kind-hearted bear has travelled all the way from Peru and full of adventures!

PLEASE LOOK AFTER THIS BEAR - This premium Paddington Bear soft toy stands 33cm high and wears his famous blue duffle coat with real toggles and a gold embroidered 'P.B' on his coat, a battered red bush hat and real shiny red wellington boots. Paddington also carries his brown suitcase with the gold initials P.B. in printed and wears his important 'Please look after this bear. Thank you' leatherette tag around his neck

A BEAR FOR LIFE - Little ones often form bonds with a special teddy bears or soft toys, and surrounding your little one with lovable teddy bears such as Paddington, to cuddle and share playtime with, helps your baby or child to feel safe and secure

A COLLECTIBLE CLASSIC GIFT - Teddy Bears and soft toys make a beautiful gifts and a Classic Paddington Bear soft toy makes a thoughtful and loving present for both children and adults of any age, but it’s especially ideal for little ones who will grow up with this fun-loving, adventurous storybook character.
description: From the manufacturer Rainbow Designs Today, Rainbow Designs, The Home of Classic Characters, is one of the country's leading character soft toy and nursery companies. It is the trusted name behind an abundance of high-profile and prestigious brand collections including Peter Rabbit, Paddington Bear, Disney Classic Winnie-the-Pooh, Disney Baby, My First Thomas & Friends, Peppa Pig for Baby, Guess How Much I Love You, The Very Hungry Caterpillar, Miffy, The Snowman and Snowdog, Elmer and Roald Dahl. Paddington Bear Classic Range This endearing high quality Paddington Bear gift range has been inspired by the original books by Michael Bond and the wonderful Peggy Fortnum illustrations. Created from premium fabrics with exceptional attention to detail that includes tartan lining on his famous blue duffel coat, smart welly boots, his well-travelled bush hat and his special ‘Please look after this bear. Thank you’ tag. A Paddington Bear from the Classic Collection makes the perfect gift for any Paddington Bear fan. Paddington Bear really is everyone’s favourite bear! This collection offers a Paddington Bear for everyone, from seasoned collectors to the youngest of fans Inspired by the original books by Michael Bond and the wonderful Peggy Fortnum illustrations Each Paddington Bear comes complete with his famous accessories Created from premium fabrics with exceptional detail Other Paddington Classic Products PA1488 The Classic Cuddly Paddington Bear is the perfect combination of a soft toy and collectable character in one - and he’d love you to give him a home! This 21cm sitting Paddington Bear sports the famous Paddington Bear accessories including a super soft lined duffle coat with real toggles, a suedette ‘Please look after this bear. Thank you’ tag around his neck and his battered red felt bush hat. PA1490 This well-travelled bear from deepest, darkest Peru would love you to look after him! The Large Classic Paddington Bear with Boots and Suitcase is the ultimate gift for a Paddington Bear enthusiast or collector and offers exceptional attention to detail and a supreme high quality finish. Paddington Bear wears his renowned duffle coat with real toggles, his battered red felt bush hat, ‘real’ shiny red wellington boots and carries a suitcase monogrammed with his initials. PA1485 The Classic Paddington Bear in a Union Jack Bag is a timeless gift for collectors, tourists and Paddington Bear fans both young and old. This Paddington Bear soft toy sports his famous accessories including his battered red felt bush hat and soft duffle coat. Presented in this beautifully illustrated gift bag, Paddington Bear is a British institution! PA1492 Raise a toast - and a marmalade sandwich - to celebrate the 60th anniversary of Michael Bond’s first storybook starring everyone’s favourite bear. The Large Cuddly Paddington Bear with Scarf has been inspired by the beautiful Peggy Fortnum illustrations. This stunning, premium quality, nostalgic Paddington Bear been created specially to commemorate the momentous occasion with a beautiful tartan scarf embroidered with the 60th anniversary artwork.
